title: アウトオブディスワールド

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
One day, my ears are greeted with lively voices in
front of the dorms.

text_block_list.name: Umamusume A
text_block_list.text:
C'mon! The win should go to Ritto Dorm,
obviously!

text_block_list.name: Umamusume B
text_block_list.text:
No way! Us Miho dormies literally caught so many
of you!

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
Hoho? I spy a gathering of ponies! What seems to
be the fuss?

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
There better not be any fightin' going on...
without me, that is!

text_block_list.name: Umamusume A
text_block_list.text:
What took you so long? We were in the middle of
a hardcore game of cops and robbers—Ritto
versus Miho!

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
Cops and robbers, you say! That game where the
cop team chases after the robber team? Now,
that takes me back!

text_block_list.name: Umamusume B
text_block_list.text: We can't decide who won.

text_block_list.name: Umamusume A
text_block_list.text:
So we need you two to settle the score with a
one-on-one!

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text: Oh?

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text: Grah?!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
If it's a one-on-one battle you want, then that's
what you'll get!

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
Hoho, what an interesting proposal. The two of
us, dueling it out... To arms, Hishiama!

text_block_list.name: Umamusume A
text_block_list.text:
Fuji, you'll be the robber! It's your win if you
manage to escape!

text_block_list.name: Umamusume B
text_block_list.text:
That means you're the cop, Hishiama! Get her in a
bear hug and arrest her!

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
Try and catch me, Hishiama! If those hands of
yours can reach my rocket-fast speed, that is!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
Hah, you'll be sorry! They don't call me Queen of
the Amazons for nothin'!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
Hmph, you slippery little weasel. I've finally got
you cornered.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text: Give up, Fuji.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text: ...Heh.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
While this is unfortunate... it would be an honor
to be captured by you.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text: Huh?! Why are you smilin'?!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Fuji Kiseki pulls Hishi Amazon in by the waist and
gracefully embraces her.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text: Whoa, hey! What are you doin'?! U-unhand me!

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text: ...I've come to steal you away.

text_block_list.name: Students
text_block_list.text: Squeee!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The roaring cheers on both sides are enough to
bring the game to a close, despite the lack of a
conclusion.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text: Geez, don't you know not to mess with me?!

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
Hehe. When you're my opponent, perhaps I can't
help but play around a bit.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
You see, Hishiama... it's my hope to entertain
everyone—as an entertainer and as a dorm
leader.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text: Tch, show off.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Despite her grouchy attitude, a faint smirk
appears on Hishi Amazon's face.
